statement: In every magma, Equation 1107 (`x = y * ((x * (z * w)) * w)`) implies Equation 2016 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (y * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0222
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x (op z w)) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op y z))
